arts.ttl: Heavy snow in Norway ahead of Europa League quarterfinal between Bodo/Glimt and Lazio
arts.sum: Heavy snow in Norway has heaped some doubt on a Europa League game on Thursday between Bodo/Glimt and Lazio. Bodo/Glimt, the champion of Norway, played Europa League home games on schedule in January, February and March during its domestic offseason.

arts.sum: Bodoe/Glimt, buoyed by their strong home form, prepare to host Lazio in the Europa League on Thursday, April 10, 2025, at 17:45 GMT. The Norwegian side will be aiming to continue their impressive run ...

arts.ttl: Bodo/Glimt vs Lazio | Europa League | Team News & Probable Lineups
arts.sum: Bodo/Glimt and Lazio clash heads in the first leg of the Europa League first leg. The contest will take place at Aspmyra Stadion in Bodo, Norway. It kicks off on Thursday at 18:45 CET. Bodo/Glimt Team News, Injuries, Suspensions & Probable Lineup Aside from injured winger Daniel Bassi, Kjetil Knutsen will have a full squad to […] The post Bodo/Glimt vs Lazio | Europa League | Team News & Probable Lineups appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Only One Lazio Star Risks Yellow-Card Suspension Second Leg Against Bodo/Glimt
arts.sum: Lazio midfielder Matias Vecino would skip the second leg against Bodo/Glimt if he collects a yellow card in Thursday’s first leg. The two sides will lock horns in Norway in the first of two contests in the Europa League quarter-final. The decisive fixture will take place at the Stadio Olimpico a week later. arts.ttl: “Lazio Have More Fear of Losing”- Bodø/Glimt Winger Stokes the Flames Ahead of UEL Clash
arts.sum: Lazio snapped a four-game winless streak on Sunday after edging Atalanta 1-0 courtesy of Gustav Isaken’s second-half goal. Next up for Marco Baroni’s side?
